title: EB and CC on the latest - Language change
scenario: Companion Card pop-up appears on Device Home Screen after language change via Device Settings even when CC firmware is already up to date
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired device.
2. On the Home screen, verify that the connected device (e.g., Tern/Emu) has no pending firmware updates for Companion Card (CC) or Embedded Bluetooth (EB).
4. Select any language from the available list.
5. Tap the "Update Now" button to apply the language change.
6. Wait for the language change process to complete.
7. Return to the Device Home screen.
expected: The Companion Card (CC) pop-up card should NOT appear on the Device Home screen, since the CC firmware is already up to date.
